message:
feat(abi): nativize 9 more GCT symbols — multicast filters, pidfd_spawn, bindresvport, innetgr, sysctl

Promote 9 GlibcCallThrough symbols to native Implemented:
- getipv4sourcefilter/setipv4sourcefilter: IP_MSFILTER setsockopt/getsockopt
- getsourcefilter/setsourcefilter: AF-independent MCAST_MSFILTER
- pidfd_spawn/pidfd_spawnp: posix_spawn + pidfd_open(2) syscall
- bindresvport: reserved port binding (512-1023) with atomic rotation
- innetgr: netgroup check (returns 0 — NIS not configured)
- __sysctl: deprecated syscall returns ENOSYS

GCT: 413→404, Implemented: 1979→1988

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
